```python
import sys

def main():
    # Read input
    N = int(sys.stdin.readline())
    A = list(map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split()))
    
    # Check for three consecutive equal elements
    for i in range(N - 2):
        if A[i] == A[i+1] == A[i+2]:
            print("Yes")
            return
    
    print("No")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
